query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_dead,
  SUM(CASE WHEN musicGenerationId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_generation_link,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverArtUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverArtUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cover_art,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lyrics IS NOT NULL AND lyrics != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_lyrics
FROM tracks
WHERE audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%';

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_dead,
  SUM(CASE WHEN musicGenerationId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_generation_link,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverArtUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverArtUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cover_art,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lyrics IS NOT NULL AND lyrics != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_lyrics
FROM tracks
WHERE audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%';
